ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product model */,
  "model" TEXT /* Name of the mixer model */,
  "bowl_capacity" TEXT /* Capacity of the bowl in liters/quarts */,
  "motor_wattage" INTEGER /* Motor wattage of the mixer */,
  "bowl_options" TEXT /* Material options for the bowl */,
  "colour_options" TEXT /* Available color options for the mixer */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "product_line" TEXT /* Name of the product line */,
  "product_url" TEXT /* URL for the product page */,
  "warranty" INTEGER /* Warranty period in years */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the product was released */,
  "retail_price" REAL /* Suggested retail price */,
  "wholesale_price" REAL /* Wholesale price for distributors */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the product is currently available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email contact for the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the supplier */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the supplier */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the supplier */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the supplier */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the supplier's website */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the supplier is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product associated with the inventory record */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Current quantity available in inventory */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Level at which a product should be reordered */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the inventory */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last inventory update */,
  "is_out_of_stock" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the product is out of stock */,
  "critical_level" INTEGER /* Level at which inventory is considered critically low */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the sale transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the customer */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "is_returned" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the sale was returned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, product manager) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "is_standard" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the feature is standard or optional */,
  "feature_group" TEXT /* Group to which the feature belongs (e.g., Performance, Design) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_features_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5 stars) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Content of the review by the user */,
  "is_verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the review is from a verified purchase */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the review is flagged for moderation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_launches" (
  "launch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each launch event */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product that is launched */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date of the product launch */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the launch event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the launch event */,
  "is_virtual" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the launch is virtual or physical */,
  "attendees" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the launch event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("launch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_launches_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the image is associated with */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL where the image is stored */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., product shot, lifestyle shot) */,
  "is_main_image" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the image is the main product image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided by the user */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the feedback is about */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the feedback is anonymous */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the feedback is flagged for moderation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
